creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Testing in response to <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/539483>

The GUI behaved as if a change might be effective – I responded to PolicyKit1 KDE Agent dialogue – however a change to my own password was not effective. 


% pkg info -x plasma5-systemsettings
plasma5-systemsettings-5.23.2
% uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #113 main-n250242-eab5358b908: Mon Oct 25 05:40:35 BST 2021     root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG  amd64 1400039 1400039
%
